stories.title: Knicks' 47-point halftime lead sets playoff record...
stories.summary: The Knicks set an NBA playoff record with a 47-point halftime lead over the Hawks, on their way to the biggest playoff victory in franchise history and a berth in the second round.

stories.title: Maxey, George deliver as Sixers push Celts to G7
stories.summary: Tyrese Maxey and Paul George combined for 53 points, and the Sixers led the entire way to win 106-93 and force a Game 7 against the Celtics.

stories.title: Clark's Fever homecoming soured by early exit
stories.summary: Caitlin Clark exited the Fever's preseason home opener vs. the Wings after colliding with Dallas forward Alanna Smith, but said afterward she was OK.

stories.title: Wild def. Stars for 1st playoff series win since '...
stories.summary: Quinn Hughes led Minnesota to its first playoff series victory in 11 years, scoring twice in the Wild's 5-2 victory over Dallas in Game 6 on Thursday night.

stories.title: Daniels, Robinson tossed in Hawks-Knicks scuffle
stories.summary: Atlanta's Dyson Daniels and New York's Mitchell Robinson were ejected from Game 6 of the Hawks-Knicks playoff series Thursday night after a fight that prompted offsetting technical fouls.
